review.summary: The workspace demonstrates robust multi-artifact integration including a financial spreadsheet, a company research database table, a sync reliability notes page, a post-it board, and a live room assistant with an active Auto-Allow toggle. Presence indicators show multiple users in different status states, and logs track changes across the room.
observedEvidence: Spreadsheet tab showing REVENUE, FY23, FY24, VARIANCE, and RATE with financial metrics
Database view under 'Company research' showing Anthropic, Stripe, Figma, OpenAI
Notes editor showing 'Sync reliability - diligence note' referencing spreadsheet values
Diligence wall with active post-it cards (blue and green) with matching logs for post-it actions
Presence sidebar showing three distinct users (Piya, alien, hassan) with colored status indicators
Auto-allow toggle checked next to the room assistant pane
missingEvidence: Explicit interactive evidence citations or clickable badges linking the spreadsheet cells directly to wiki/note references
Direct messaging / private chat between two specific users, separate from room chat and the room assistant

workflowPainPoints.painPoint: Reconciling deletion behavior and null cell values when syncing synthetic financial audits to the validation sheet.
workflowPainPoints.note: The finance user raises a sync reliability note explicitly questioning whether null calls should survive synchronization instead of being deleted.

recommendedEvalAdditions: Verify user-to-user private chat workflows separate from room chat
Test actual citation linkage clickability to see if it focuses the corresponding spreadsheet cell
